languages.text: {n}Ничто не препятствует выходу флагмана на орбиту мертвого мира. Вам остается лишь удостовериться в готовности всех, кто будет сопровождать вас в сложнейшей миссии по возвращению Патента законному владельцу, и объявить начало операции по вокс-каналу.{/n}

{n}There is nothing to prevent the flagship from entering the dead world's orbit. Now all that is left is to confirm the readiness of those who will accompany you on the difficult mission to restore the Warrant to its rightful owner, and to announce the launch of the operation over the vox-channel.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ничто не препятствует выходу флагмана на орбиту мертвого мира. Вам остается лишь удостовериться в готовности всех, кто будет сопровождать вас в сложнейшей миссии по возвращению Патента законному владельцу, и объявить начало операции по вокс-каналу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}There is nothing to prevent the flagship from entering the dead world's orbit. Now all that is left is to confirm the readiness of those who will accompany you on the difficult mission to restore the Warrant to its rightful owner, and to announce the launch of the operation over the vox-channel.{/n}

{n}There is nothing to prevent the flagship from entering the dead world's orbit. Now all that is left is to confirm the readiness of those who will accompany you on the difficult mission to restore the Warrant to its rightful owner, and to announce the launch of the operation over the vox-channel.{/n}

{n}There is nothing to prevent the flagship from entering the dead world's orbit. Now all that is left is to confirm the readiness of those who will accompany you on the difficult mission to restore the Warrant to its rightful owner, and to announce the launch of the operation over the vox-channel.{/n}

languages.text: {n}旗艦が死の世界の軌道に入るのを妨げるものは何もありません。残された作業は、あなたと共に証書を正当な所有者に返還する困難な任務に同行する者たちの準備を確認し、そして作戦の開始をヴォックスチャネルで発表することだけです。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is nothing to prevent the flagship from entering the dead world's orbit. Now all that is left is to confirm the readiness of those who will accompany you on the difficult mission to restore the Warrant to its rightful owner, and to announce the launch of the operation over the vox-channel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 旗艦が死の世界の軌道に入るのを妨げるものは何もありません。残された作業は、あなたと共に証書を正当な所有者に返還する困難な任務に同行する者たちの準備を確認し、そして作戦の開始をヴォックスチャネルで発表することだけです。

languages.text: {n}Ya nada puede impedir que la nave insignia entre en la órbita del mundo muerto. Solo queda confirmar que quienes te acompañarán en la difícil misión de recuperar la Patente para su legítim{mf|o|a} propietari{mf|o|a} están listos y anuncia el inicio de la operación por el voco.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is nothing to prevent the flagship from entering the dead world's orbit. Now all that is left is to confirm the readiness of those who will accompany you on the difficult mission to restore the Warrant to its rightful owner, and to announce the launch of the operation over the vox-channel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ya nada puede impedir que la nave insignia entre en la órbita del mundo muerto. Solo queda confirmar que quienes te acompañarán en la difícil misión de recuperar la Patente para su legítim{mf|o|a} propietari{mf|o|a} están listos y anuncia el inicio de la operación por el voco.{/n}

languages.text: {n}再无任何障碍能阻拦旗舰进入这个死寂世界的轨道。你即将踏上夺回贸易授状、使其物归原主的艰险旅程。此刻只剩两件事：确认随行人员的整备情况，并通过音阵频道宣布行动正式开始。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is nothing to prevent the flagship from entering the dead world's orbit. Now all that is left is to confirm the readiness of those who will accompany you on the difficult mission to restore the Warrant to its rightful owner, and to announce the launch of the operation over the vox-channel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}再无任何障碍能阻拦旗舰进入这个死寂世界的轨道。你即将踏上夺回贸易授状、使其物归原主的艰险旅程。此刻只剩两件事：确认随行人员的整备情况，并通过音阵频道宣布行动正式开始。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nichts kann den Vorstoße des Flaggschiffs in den Orbit der Totenwelt aufhalten. Jetzt musst du dich nur noch der Bereitschaft alle jener versichern, die dich auf die schwierige Mission begleiten, den Handelsbrief seinem rechtmäßigen Besitzer zu übergeben, und den Beginn der Operation über den Voxkanal verkünden.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is nothing to prevent the flagship from entering the dead world's orbit. Now all that is left is to confirm the readiness of those who will accompany you on the difficult mission to restore the Warrant to its rightful owner, and to announce the launch of the operation over the vox-channel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nichts kann den Vorstoße des Flaggschiffs in den Orbit der Totenwelt aufhalten. Jetzt musst du dich nur noch der Bereitschaft alle jener versichern, die dich auf die schwierige Mission begleiten, den Handelsbrief seinem rechtmäßigen Besitzer zu übergeben, und den Beginn der Operation über den Voxkanal verkünden.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sancak gemisinin ölü dünyanın yörüngesine girmesini engelleyecek hiçbir şey yok. Şimdi geriye kalan tek şey, Ruhsatname'yi haklı sahibine iade etmek üzere çıkacağın bu zorlu görevde sana eşlik edeceklerin hazır olduğunu teyit etmek ve operasyonun başladığını voks kanalından duyurmak.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is nothing to prevent the flagship from entering the dead world's orbit. Now all that is left is to confirm the readiness of those who will accompany you on the difficult mission to restore the Warrant to its rightful owner, and to announce the launch of the operation over the vox-channel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sancak gemisinin ölü dünyanın yörüngesine girmesini engelleyecek hiçbir şey yok. Şimdi geriye kalan tek şey, Ruhsatname'yi haklı sahibine iade etmek üzere çıkacağın bu zorlu görevde sana eşlik edeceklerin hazır olduğunu teyit etmek ve operasyonun başladığını voks kanalından duyurmak.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Plus rien n'empêche le vaisseau amiral d'entrer en orbite autour du monde mort. À présent, il ne vous reste plus qu'à confirmer que vos compagnons sont prêts à vous aider à reprendre votre lettre de marque et à annoncer le lancement des opérations via le canal-vox.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is nothing to prevent the flagship from entering the dead world's orbit. Now all that is left is to confirm the readiness of those who will accompany you on the difficult mission to restore the Warrant to its rightful owner, and to announce the launch of the operation over the vox-channel.{/n}
